title: feat: allowlist vendouple for community models
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Welcome to the model garden
gist.blurb: We've handed vendouple the keys to the community models garden. Can't wait to see what new generative goodness they plant!
gist.summary: Added GitHub user vendouple to the COMMUNITY_MODEL_ALLOWED_GITHUB_IDS allowlist.
gist.impact: The user vendouple can now publish and share their own community AI models on the pollinations.ai platform.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot welcoming a new creator to the garden, handing them a glowing VIP pass or opening a wooden gate.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot opening a small wooden garden gate, holding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) VIP ticket. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm and welcoming.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot opening a small wooden garden gate, holding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) VIP ticket. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background.
